title: setaria elegantula
intro: Setaria elegantula, also known as East Indian foxtail, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Setaria elegantula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Setaria elegantula can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
